steps.title: Basic Details & Age
steps.description: Provide your name and date of birth to check age requirements.

steps.title: Citizenship Check
steps.description: Verify your citizenship status to confirm full eligibility.

steps.title: Voter Registration
steps.description: Register yourself on the official electoral roll.

steps.title: Find Polling Station
steps.description: Locate where you need to go to cast your ballot.

steps.title: Voting Day
steps.description: Bring your ID, verify your identity, and cast your vote!
